AAtelier Lane
ShopCollectionsService

Service

Support that makes shopping feel easy

Delivery, returns, payments, and customer help are organized in one place so shoppers know what to expect before they buy.

Checkout demoShop products
14 daysReturn window
2 optionsDelivery speeds
4 stepsOrder journey
6 daysWeekly support

Need help?

Use these customer-care channels when the store is connected to real support.

Live chat support@atelierlane.com Mon-Sat, 9 AM - 6 PM Local and nationwide delivery

What shoppers can expect

Short, clear service promises reduce hesitation before checkout.

Tracked delivery

Customers can follow an order from confirmation through packing, dispatch, and delivery.

Secure checkout

The flow is ready for card payments now and can connect to Paystack, Stripe, or Flutterwave.

Simple returns

A clear return window and condition rules keep post-purchase support easy to understand.

Owner control

Admin tools support product uploads, image previews, stock counts, categories, and order views.

From bag to doorstep

A simple order journey that gives both the shopper and owner confidence.

01

Order received

The shopper gets confirmation and the owner sees the order in the admin workflow.

02

Packed with care

Items are checked for size, color, and condition before dispatch.

03

On the way

Delivery updates keep the customer informed until the package arrives.

04

Aftercare

Returns, exchanges, and questions are handled from the same service promise.

Policy overview

Clear promises for delivery and returns

These starter policies make the site feel credible today and can become editable store settings later.

Standard delivery3-5 business days$8 flat rate
Express delivery1-2 business days$18 flat rate
ReturnsWithin 14 daysUnworn items with tags
Support hoursMon-Sat9:00 AM - 6:00 PM

Customer-first operations

The next production step is connecting orders to email notifications, payment status, and admin fulfillment controls.

Try checkoutFind products

Can customers pay on delivery?

Yes. The checkout already includes a pay-on-delivery option for demo use, and it can be connected to your real order workflow.

Can the owner upload product photos?

Yes. The admin page supports image file selection and image URLs for product previews.

Can delivery prices change later?

Yes. The delivery choices are currently simple demo values and can be moved into store settings.
